description: Do you know how AWESOME you are? Yes, you are! Life in today's world is busy, full of worries, and courage isn't always easy to find, especially for children. With school problems, homework, friends, and life changes, young girls have a lot to handle. Aside from these types of issues, there are a ton of joyful days ready to be celebrated as well. In this book, you’ll find 10 stories about awesome girls ! Each story is full of characters that will draw you in and become your best friends. Get to know Jana, Stacy, Liz, and Jessie as well as many other girls who will prove to you that nothing is impossible. Throughout the book, you will find ways on how to handle many situations such as: Overcoming anxiety Dealing with fears Building courage Being respectful Not only that, but you will also learn how awesome girls make it through: Losing best friends Having trouble in math class Dealing with problems with parents Facing a presentation in public Read about the girls working together with friends, asking parents for support, and relying on teachers to help them through the problems that come their way. At school, home, or having fun on the weekends, each story covers different circumstances in their own special way. Join the girls as they travel to the bowling alley, plan a garden project, compete for awards, and present their speeches. You will also want to celebrate as you read about them overcoming sadness, gaining confidence, and being a leader for others. There are examples of encouragement in each story, and they are meant to build self-esteem and mindfulness, while teaching bravery, strength, and determination. The stories in this book are written to share real life problems in the lives of young girls. In each story, there's a moral to understand, and through the actions of each character, their fears and concerns are resolved. So what are you waiting for to buy this perfect gift? Click on "buy now" and help a girl believe in herself and encourage others! Read more
